description: The y-axis uses a logarithmic scale, which compresses the enormous differences between regions and makes the bars appear far more similar in height than they actually are. A reader unfamiliar with log scales would likely underestimate how dramatically South-East Asia and Africa dwarf the Americas and Europe in TB deaths. The large gap between ~430,000 deaths and ~17,000 deaths is visually minimized, obscuring the true magnitude of the disparity.
